basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Resarch Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has published the JRF (GATE) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 JRF (GATE) position. Candidates holding a Post Graduate degree in Physics or a Graduate/ Post Graduate degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Production, or Manufacturing Engineering with CSIR-UGC NET/ GATE qualification are eligible to apply online. The application process will remain open until 14-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Physics or Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Production/ Manufacturing Engineering selected through a process described through National Eligibility Test CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professors) or GATE.
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Physics or Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Production/ Manufacturing Engineering selected through a process described through National Eligibility Test CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professors) or GATE.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on resume Online Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_guwahati_: Post Graduate in Physics or Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Production/ Manufacturing Engineering selected through a process described through National Eligibility Test CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professors) or GATE.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate in Physics or Graduate/Post Graduate in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electronics/ Instrumentation/ Production/ Manufacturing Engineering selected through a process described through National Eligibility Test CSIR UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professors) or GATE.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on resume Online Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the JRF (GATE) position at IIT Guwahati is 14th July 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a Post Graduate degree in Physics, or a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Production, or Manufacturing Engineering. Candidates must have been selected through CSIR UGC NET (including lectureship) or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF (GATE) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 38,250.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the JRF (GATE) position at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF (GATE) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their resume, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. When will the shortlisted candidates be informed?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email on 15th July 2026.
